basic_details.job_title: DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for DEO, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for all posts is 59 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Diploma/MD in Public Health/PSM/Community Medicine/CHA/Tuberculosis & Chest Diseases, B.Sc. in Science, Intermediate (10+2) in Science, MPW/LHV/ANM/HW/Education/Counselling or Tuberculosis Health Visitors recognized Course & Certificate Course in Computer Operation (Minimum 2 months), Computer Science Degree/Diploma in Computer Application/Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application (Tamil/English typing)
qualification.details: Medical Officer (TB): MBBS, Diploma /M. D. Public Health/P.S.M/Community Medicine/CHA/Tuberculosis & Chest Diseases with 1 year experience in NTEP. Health Visitor(TB): Intermediate(10+2) in science & Experience of working as MPW/LHV/ANM/HW/Education / Counselling or Tuberculosis Health Visitors recognized Course & Certificate Course in Computer Operation (Minimum 2 months). Data Entry Operator: Computer Science Degree/Diploma in Computer Application/Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application (Tamil/English typing).

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Tiruchirappalli DEO, Medical Officer and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in/notice_category/announcements/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the DHS Tiruchirappalli Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for various posts under the District Health Society Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026. These include Medical Officer, Health Visitor, and Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or speed post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree and a Diploma/MD in Public Health/PSM/Community Medicine/CHA/Tuberculosis & Chest Diseases, along with 1 year of experience in NTEP.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the posts advertised by DHS Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced under the DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 is 59 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Health Visitor (TB) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Health Visitor (TB) post ranges from Rs. 15,000/- to Rs. 63,000/- per month, as per the official notification details.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The provided information does not mention any specific application fee for any category of candidates for the DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026. It is advisable to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 will be based on merit. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their academic qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form for DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for the DHS Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of the District Collector, Tiruchirappalli, which is https://tiruchirappalli.nic.in/notice_category/announcements/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The job type for the posts advertised by the District Health Society Tiruchirappalli is contractual. This means the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.
